name: Topo Coaster Set
description: Six round CNC-carved coasters inspired by Baja California's topographic landscape. Each coaster features a unique terrain motif — from coastal dunes to canyon ridges. Comes with a vertical slot holder crafted from the same walnut stock.
care: Wipe clean with a dry cloth. Re-oil occasionally to maintain finish.

name: Desert Clock
description: A 14-inch round wall clock carved from solid walnut. Minimal time markers let the natural wood grain speak. Silent quartz movement. Designed to be the quiet centerpiece of any room.
care: Dust with a soft cloth. Runs on 1x AA battery (included).

name: Succulent Stand
description: An elevated platform for your favorite plant. CNC-milled from solid oak with angled legs and a circular top tray. Raises your succulent or small pot to eye level on any shelf or desk.
care: Wipe clean. Avoid prolonged water contact — use a drip tray inside.

name: Candle Holder — Mesquite
description: A chunky, organic candle holder carved from mesquite-toned pine. The asymmetric shape catches candlelight beautifully. Fits standard taper and pillar candles.
care: Wipe wax residue with a warm cloth. Keep away from open flame contact with the wood surface.

name: Wall Shelf — Raw Edge
description: A floating wall shelf with a live-edge front profile. CNC-flattened and hand-sanded, then sealed with a clear polyurethane for durability. Hidden bracket mounting for a clean look.
care: Dust regularly. Avoid placing hot items directly on surface.

name: Entryway Organizer
description: Wall-mounted key and mail organizer for your entryway. Features three key hooks, a shallow tray for wallet and change, and a slot for envelopes. Laser-engraved Baja Works mark on the side.
care: Wipe with a damp cloth. Hardware rated for drywall and stud mounting.

name: Bat Rack Organizer
description: Keep the garage or bedroom tidy. This wall-mounted bat rack holds up to 4 bats vertically with padded cradles to prevent scratching. Optional name engraving available.
care: Wipe clean. Rated for bats up to 34 inches.

name: Name Plaque — Engraved
description: A personalized name plaque laser-engraved on solid maple. Perfect for a kid's bedroom door, desk, or shelf. Clean block lettering with your choice of font.
care: Wipe with a dry cloth. Indoor use recommended.

name: Trophy Display Shelf
description: A tiered display shelf for trophies, medals, and awards. Three stepped levels give each piece its own spotlight. Wall-mounted with hidden brackets.
care: Dust regularly. Supports up to 20 lbs distributed weight.

name: Engraved Pet Tag — Brass
description: A solid brass pet tag with deep laser engraving. Your pet's name on the front, your phone number on the back. Comes with a split ring for easy collar attachment.
care: Brass develops a natural patina over time. Polish with a soft cloth to restore shine.

name: Elevated Feeding Station
description: Raised feeding station with two stainless steel bowls. The elevated design promotes better posture for your pet. CNC-milled from solid oak with a food-safe finish.
care: Bowls are dishwasher safe. Wipe wood frame with a damp cloth.

name: Leash & Collar Hanger
description: Wall-mounted leash and collar organizer with three sturdy hooks. Laser-engraved paw print detail. Keeps your entryway clean and walk-ready.
features: Holds up to 15 lbs per hook
care: Wipe with a dry cloth. Mount into stud or use included drywall anchors.

name: Charcuterie Board — Walnut
description: A generously sized charcuterie and serving board carved from a single slab of American walnut. Juice groove around the perimeter. Optional personalized engraving for weddings, housewarming, or holidays.
care: Hand wash and dry immediately. Re-oil with food-safe mineral oil monthly.

name: Custom Engraved Sign
description: A personalized wooden sign laser-engraved with your message, name, address, or quote. Available in multiple sizes. Perfect for front porches, offices, or as a gift.
care: Indoor signs: wipe clean. Outdoor signs: sealed with marine-grade polyurethane.

name: Wedding Date Board
description: A commemorative board engraved with names, wedding date, and an optional custom message. Carved from solid walnut with a clear finish that highlights the natural grain. A meaningful keepsake.
care: Display indoors. Wipe with a dry soft cloth.

name: Custom Poster — 18x24
description: A custom-designed poster printed on premium matte stock. Send us your concept and we'll design it from scratch.

name: Canvas Print — 16x20
description: Gallery-wrapped canvas print from your photo or custom artwork.

name: Photo Collage Canvas
description: A multi-photo collage printed on stretched canvas. We design the layout — you provide the memories.

name: Event Banner — 3x6ft
description: Full-color vinyl banner with custom graphics. Grommeted and ready to hang.

name: Sticker Pack — Custom
description: Pack of 25 custom die-cut vinyl stickers. Waterproof and UV-resistant.

name: Logo Design Package
description: Full brand identity package — logo, color palette, typography, and usage guidelines.
